# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it privately by emailing [alperencolgecen@gmail.com](mailto:alperencolgecen@gmail.com). Do not create a public issue.

## Supported Versions

This repository currently maintains the latest development branch. Security updates are provided as needed.

## What to Include

When reporting a vulnerability, include:
- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- Any relevant code or configuration details
- Proof-of-concept if available
